Due to the tiled nature of this architecture, OPDB benchmarks can be made arbitrarily large in order to evaluate the efficiency of EDA tools across different design scales and configurations. OPDB contains several accelerators enabling full SoC designs to be used as benchmarks for EDA tools.
items.abstract_zh: 电子设计自动化 (EDA) 的进步使我们能够管理摩尔定律允许的集成电路 (IC) 复杂性的指数增长，并将其转化为性能改进。此外，随着过去十年摩尔定律的放缓以及登纳德缩放比例的崩溃，EDA 工具在解决 IC 效率低下问题方面变得越来越重要。随着新的提案和技术被提出来解决 IC 设计当前和未来的问题，需要使用一套具体的当代基准对其进行评估。传统上，EDA 研究人员主要依靠行业提供的设计基准来评估其工具的性能。然而，由于他们努力保持竞争优势，行业版本包括较旧的设计，有关每个设计细节的信息有限。这意味着在多种情况下，新的提案是用明显过时的设计来评估的，通常已经有十多年的历史了，特别是在规模方面。在这项工作中，我们描述了 OPDB：EDA 社区的可扩展、模块化、异构和可扩展的设计基准。 OPDB 利用并扩展了 OpenPiton 开源、基于图块的研究基础设施，以创建针对不同组件的大量设计基准。由于该架构的平铺性质，OPDB 基准可以任意大，以便评估不同设计规模和配置的 EDA 工具的效率。 OPDB 包含多个加速器，使完整的 SoC 设计能够用作 EDA 工具的基准。

items.title: High-Performance Accurate and Approximate Multipliers for FPGA-Based Hardware Accelerators.
items.abstract: Multiplication is one of the widely used arithmetic operations in a variety of applications, such as image/video processing and machine learning. FPGA vendors provide high-performance multipliers in the form of DSP blocks. These multipliers are not only limited in number and have fixed locations on FPGAs but can also create additional routing delays and may prove inefficient for smaller bit-width multiplications. Therefore, FPGA vendors additionally provide optimized soft IP cores for multiplication. However, in this work, we advocate that these soft multiplier IP cores for FPGAs still need better designs to provide high-performance and resource efficiency. Toward this, we present generic area-optimized, low-latency accurate, and approximate softcore multiplier architectures, which exploit the underlying architectural features of FPGAs, i.e., lookup table (LUT) structures and fast-carry chains to reduce the overall critical path delay (CPD) and resource utilization of multipliers. Compared to Xilinx multiplier LogiCORE IP, our proposed unsigned and signed accurate architecture provides up to 25% and 53% reduction in LUT utilization, respectively, for different sizes of multipliers. Moreover, with our unsigned approximate multiplier architectures, a reduction of up to 51% in the CPD can be achieved with an insignificant loss in output accuracy when compared with the LogiCORE IP. For illustration, we have deployed the proposed multiplier architecture in accelerators used in image and video applications, and evaluated them for area and performance gains. Our library of accurate and approximate multipliers is opensource and available online at <uri>https://cfaed.tu-dresden.de/pd-downloads</uri> to fuel further research and development in this area, facilitate reproducible research, and thereby enabling a new research direction for the FPGA community.
items.abstract_zh: 乘法是图像/视频处理和机器学习等各种应用中广泛使用的算术运算之一。 FPGA 供应商以 DSP 模块的形式提供高性能乘法器。这些乘法器不仅数量有限并且在 FPGA 上具有固定位置，而且还会产生额外的布线延迟，并且对于较小位宽的乘法可能效率低下。因此，FPGA供应商另外提供了针对乘法优化的软IP核。然而，在这项工作中，我们主张这些用于 FPGA 的软乘法器 IP 核仍然需要更好的设计来提供高性能和资源效率。为此，我们提出了通用的面积优化、低延迟精确和近似软核乘法器架构，该架构利用 FPGA 的底层架构特征，即查找表 (LUT) 结构和快速进位链来减少乘法器的整体关键路径延迟 (CPD) 和资源利用率。与 Xilinx 乘法器 LogiCORE IP 相比，我们提出的无符号和有符号精确架构对于不同大小的乘法器，LUT 利用率分别降低了 25% 和 53%。此外，与 LogiCORE IP 相比，利用我们的无符号近似乘法器架构，可以将 CPD 降低高达 51%，而输出精度的损失却微乎其微。为了便于说明，我们在图像和视频应用中使用的加速器中部署了所提出的乘法器架构，并评估了它们的面积和性能增益。我们的精确和近似乘法器库是开源的，可在 <uri>https://cfaed.tu-dresden.de/pd-downloads</uri> 在线获取，以推动该领域的进一步研究和开发，促进可重复研究，从而为 FPGA 社区开辟新的研究方向。

items.title: XMAP: Programming Memristor Crossbars for Analog Matrix-Vector Multiplication: Toward High Precision Using Representable Matrices.
items.abstract: Linear transformations are the dominating computation within many important applications. The natural multiply-and-accumulate feature of memristor crossbar arrays promise unprecedented processing capabilities to resistive dot-product engines (DPEs), which can accelerate approximate matrix–vector multiplication (MVM). Unfortunately, the precision of the analog computation may be degraded by parasitics, nonlinear device characteristics, and variations. In this article, we propose a framework, called XMAP, for mapping an arbitrary matrix into appropriate memristor conductance values (or state variables for nonlinear devices). The specified conductance values are next programmed to the memristor hardware using accurate closed-loop tuning. XMAP is based on formulating the mapping problem as a mathematical optimization problem, which can be elegantly minimized using the concept of representable matrices, i.e., the matrices that can be represented on a crossbar. Compared to the state-of-the-art conversion algorithm, the computational accuracy is improved with up to <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$3.29 \times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> at the expense of overhead in runtime. The precision improvements translate into noteworthy application-level benefits within signal compression and neural network inference.
items.abstract_zh: 线性变换是许多重要应用中的主导计算。忆阻器交叉阵列的自然乘法和累加功能为电阻点积引擎（DPE）提供了前所未有的处理能力，可以加速近似矩阵向量乘法（MVM）。不幸的是，模拟计算的精度可能会因寄生效应、非线性器件特性和变化而降低。在本文中，我们提出了一个称为 XMAP 的框架，用于将任意矩阵映射到适当的忆阻器电导值（或非线性器件的状态变量）。接下来使用精确的闭环调谐将指定的电导值编程到忆阻器硬件。 XMAP 基于将映射问题表述为数学优化问题，可以使用可表示矩阵（即可以在交叉开关上表示的矩阵）的概念来优雅地最小化该问题。与最先进的转换算法相比，计算精度提高了高达 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$3.29 \times $ </tex-math></inline-formula>运行时的开销。精度的提高转化为信号压缩和神经网络推理中值得注意的应用级优势。

items.title: Detecting Hardware Trojans Using Combined Self-Testing and Imaging.
items.abstract: Hardware Trojans are malicious modifications in integrated circuits (ICs) with an intent to breach security and compromise the reliability of an electronic system. This article proposes a framework using self-testing, advanced imaging, and image processing with machine learning to detect hardware Trojans inserted by untrusted foundries. It includes on-chip test structures with negligible power, delay, and silicon area overheads. The core step of the framework is on-chip golden circuit design, which can provide authentic samples for image-based Trojan detection through self-testing. This core step enables a golden-chip-free Trojan detection that does not rely on an existing image data set from Trojan-free chip or image synthesizing. We have conducted an in-depth analysis of detection steps and discussed possible attacks with countermeasures to strengthen this framework. The performance evaluation on a 28-nm FPGA and a 90-nm IC validates its high accuracy and reliability for practical applications.
items.abstract_zh: 硬件木马是对集成电路 (IC) 的恶意修改，其目的是破坏安全性并损害电子系统的可靠性。本文提出了一个框架，使用自测试、高级成像和图像处理与机器学习来检测由不受信任的代工厂插入的硬件木马。它包括功耗、延迟和硅面积开销可忽略不计的片上测试结构。该框架的核心步骤是片上黄金电路设计，通过自测可以为基于图像的木马检测提供真实的样本。这一核心步骤实现了无金芯片木马检测，不依赖于无木马芯片或图像合成的现有图像数据集。我们对检测步骤进行了深入分析，并讨论了可能的攻击以及加强该框架的对策。对28 nm FPGA和90 nm IC的性能评估验证了其在实际应用中的高精度和可靠性。

items.title: Photonic Reconfigurable Accelerators for Efficient Inference of CNNs With Mixed-Sized Tensors.
items.abstract: Photonic microring resonator (MRR)-based hardware accelerators have been shown to provide disruptive speedup and energy-efficiency improvements for processing deep convolutional neural networks (CNNs). However, previous MRR-based CNN accelerators fail to provide efficient adaptability for CNNs with mixed-sized tensors. One example of such CNNs is depthwise separable CNNs. Performing inferences of CNNs with mixed-sized tensors on such inflexible accelerators often leads to low hardware utilization, which diminishes the achievable performance and energy efficiency from the accelerators. In this article, we present a novel way of introducing reconfigurability in the MRR-based CNN accelerators, to enable dynamic maximization of the size compatibility between the accelerator hardware components and the CNN tensors that are processed using the hardware components. We classify the state-of-the-art MRR-based CNN accelerators from prior works into two categories, based on the layout and relative placements of the utilized hardware components in the accelerators. We then use our method to introduce reconfigurability in accelerators from these two classes, to consequently improve their parallelism, the flexibility of efficiently mapping tensors of different sizes, speed, and overall energy efficiency. We evaluate our reconfigurable accelerators against three prior works for the area proportionate outlook (equal hardware area for all accelerators). Our evaluation for the inference of four modern CNNs indicates that our designed reconfigurable CNN accelerators provide improvements of up to <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.8\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> in frames-per-second (FPS) and up to <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.5\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> in FPS/W, compared to an MRR-based accelerator from prior work.
items.abstract_zh: 基于光子微环谐振器 (MRR) 的硬件加速器已被证明可为深度卷积神经网络 (CNN) 的处理提供颠覆性的加速和能效改进。然而，之前基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器无法为具有混合大小张量的 CNN 提供高效的适应性。此类 CNN 的一个例子是深度可分离 CNN。在这种不灵活的加速器上使用混合大小的张量执行 CNN 推理通常会导致硬件利用率较低，从而降低了加速器可实现的性能和能源效率。在本文中，我们提出了一种在基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器中引入可重构性的新颖方法，以动态最大化加速器硬件组件和使用硬件组件处理的 CNN 张量之间的尺寸兼容性。我们根据加速器中所使用的硬件组件的布局和相对位置，将先前作品中最先进的基于 MRR 的 CNN 加速器分为两类。然后，我们使用我们的方法在这两类加速器中引入可重构性，从而提高它们的并行性、有效映射不同大小、速度的张量的灵活性和整体能源效率。我们根据面积比例前景（所有加速器的硬件面积相同）对我们的可重构加速器与之前的三项工作进行了评估。我们对四个现代 CNN 推理的评估表明，我们设计的可重构 CNN 加速器可提供高达 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.8\times $ 的改进</tex-math></inline-formula> 以每秒帧数 (FPS) 为单位，最高 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.5\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula>与之前工作中基于 MRR 的加速器相比，以 FPS/W 计算。

items.title: ASCENT: Communication Scheduling for SDF on Bufferless Software-Defined NoC.
items.abstract: Bufferless software-defined network-on-chip (NoC) is a promising alternative to conventional dynamic routing as it offers predictable data movement with real-time guarantees. Existing time-division multiplexing (TDM)-based mechanisms for predictability assume the worst-case communication pattern (e.g., all-to-all) and compute a fixed schedule wherein the cores can only communicate during the allocated time slots. These approaches lead to low application throughput as they cannot adapt to application characteristics. In this article, we present an application specific, non-TDM-based communication scheduling mechanism for bufferless software-defined NoCs. We choose the synchronous dataflow (SDF) model of computation to represent the input streaming applications. We propose ASCENT, a novel offline approach that takes the SDF-specified streaming application and the NoC architecture as input, exploits the task interactions and the timing information in the SDF, and generates the task-to-core mapping and communication schedule that is represented compactly in hardware. ASCENT achieves <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.8\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> better performance on average than existing TDM-based NoCs and manages to achieve the performance of an ideal dynamically routed NoC, yet ensuring predictability.
items.abstract_zh: 无缓冲区软件定义片上网络 (NoC) 是传统动态路由的一种有前途的替代方案，因为它提供可预测的数据移动和实时保证。现有的基于时分复用（TDM）的可预测性机制假设最坏情况的通信模式（例如，全部到全部）并计算固定的调度，其中内核只能在分配的时隙期间进行通信。这些方法会导致应用程序吞吐量较低，因为它们无法适应应用程序特性。在本文中，我们提出了一种适用于无缓冲软件定义 NoC 的特定于应用的、非基于 TDM 的通信调度机制。我们选择同步数据流（SDF）计算模型来表示输入流应用程序。我们提出了 ASCENT，一种新颖的离线方法，它以 SDF 指定的流应用程序和 NoC 架构作为输入，利用 SDF 中的任务交互和定时信息，并生成在硬件中紧凑表示的任务到核心的映射和通信调度。 ASCENT 实现了 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.8\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 平均性能优于现有基于 TDM 的 NoC，并设法实现了该性能理想的动态路由 NoC，同时确保可预测性。

items.title: Heterogeneous FPGA Architecture Using Threshold Logic Gates for Improved Area, Power, and Performance.
items.abstract: The flexibility of field-programmable gate arrays (FPGAs) is attributed to the reconfigurability of their basic logic elements (BLEs). Traditionally, the BLEs are comprised of one or more lookup tables (LUTs) of <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$n$ </tex-math></inline-formula> inputs, that are designed to implement Boolean functions of <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$n$ </tex-math></inline-formula> or fewer inputs. In an attempt to reduce the area and power consumption that comes from using LUTs, a number of complex LUT architectures have been reported. Although most of the proposed complex LUT architectures have resulted in reduced area and power, this has always been at cost of the decreased performance. This article proposes a new FPGA architecture, called threshold logic FPGA (TLFPGA), which results in significant improvement in performance, power, and area (PPA). TLFPGA is comprised of a combination of LUTs and a new type of BLE referred to as a threshold logic cell (TLC) (Muroga, 1987). Although TLCs implement a relatively small subset of Boolean functions known as threshold functions (Muroga, 1987), they require far fewer registers and multiplexers than an LUT, and are also significantly faster. This article describes the architecture of the TLFPGA and a technology mapping algorithm tailored for a TLFGA. On average, TLFPGA designs use 18% fewer registers and multiplexers, which improves the collective area of BLEs by approximately 16%, power by 14%, and performance by 5%. The improvements have been demonstrated in both 40 and 28 nm technologies for ISCAS-85 circuits as well as practical circuits, using industry-standard flows. The improvements were also demonstrated using a layout of the architecture.
items.abstract_zh: 现场可编程门阵列 (FPGA) 的灵活性归因于其基本逻辑元件 (BLE) 的可重构性。传统上，BLE 由一个或多个 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$n$ </tex-math></inline-formula> 输入的查找表 (LUT) 组成，旨在实现<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$n$ </tex-math></inline-formula> 或更少输入的布尔函数。为了减少使用 LUT 所带来的面积和功耗，已经报道了许多复杂的 LUT 架构。尽管大多数提出的复杂 LUT 架构都导致了面积和功耗的减少，但这始终是以性能下降为代价的。本文提出了一种新的 FPGA 架构，称为阈值逻辑 FPGA (TLFPGA)，它在性能、功耗和面积 (PPA) 方面实现了显着改进。 TLFPGA 由 LUT 和一种称为阈值逻辑单元 (TLC) 的新型 BLE 组合而成（Muroga，1987）。尽管 TLC 实现了称为阈值函数的相对较小的布尔函数子集（Muroga，1987），但它们需要的寄存器和多路复用器比 LUT 少得多，而且速度也快得多。本文介绍了 TLFPGA 的架构以及为 TLFGA 量身定制的技术映射算法。平均而言，TLFPGA 设计使用的寄存器和多路复用器减少了 18%，这将 BLE 的总面积提高了约 16%，功耗提高了 14%，性能提高了 5%。这些改进已在 ISCAS-85 电路的 40 和 28 nm 技术以及实际电路中使用行业标准流程得到了证明。还使用架构布局演示了这些改进。

items.title: Design and Experimentation of Inductorless Low-Pass NGD Integrated Circuit in 180-nm CMOS Technology.
items.abstract: This article introduces an innovative design of a low-pass (LP) negative group delay (NGD) integrated circuit (IC) in the 180-nm CMOS technology. The LP-NGD circuit is an inductorless topology constituted by RC-network with CMOS metal-insulator-metal (MIM) capacitor and polygate resistor. The design methodology is illustrated by considering the chip layout process. Then, the first run simulation is performed with the design rule check (DRC) and 2.5 mm <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">${\times }$ </tex-math></inline-formula> 2.2 mm layout versus schematic (LVS) approaches. The feasibility of the CMOS LP-NGD IC circuit implementation is validated with chip-onboard (CoB). The proof of concept (PoC) of the LP-NGD miniaturized circuit was tested in both S-parameter and time domain (TD). As expected, the calculated, simulated, and experimented results of CoB showing NGD of about −10 ns over 12 MHz and −10 dB attenuation are confirmed. The active CMOS LP-NGD technology compensates the insertion loss to 2.4 dB, the GD reaches −11 ns, and the reflection loss reaches −20 dB. Moreover, TD investigations were also performed to show the feasibility of generating pulse and arbitrary waveform signal time advance through the designed and fabricated LP-NGD CoB prototypes.
items.abstract_zh: 本文介绍了采用 180 nm CMOS 技术的低通 (LP) 负群延迟 (NGD) 集成电路 (IC) 的创新设计。 LP-NGD 电路是一种无电感拓扑，由 RC 网络、CMOS 金属-绝缘体-金属 (MIM) 电容器和多晶硅电阻器构成。通过考虑芯片布局过程来说明设计方法。然后，使用设计规则检查 (DRC) 和 2.5 mm <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">${\times }$ </tex-math></inline-formula> 执行第一次运行仿真2.2 mm 布局与原理图 (LVS) 方法的比较。 CMOS LP-NGD IC 电路实现的可行性通过板载芯片 (CoB) 进行了验证。 LP-NGD 小型化电路的概念验证 (PoC) 在 S 参数和时域 (TD) 方面进行了测试。正如预期的那样，CoB 的计算、模拟和实验结果显示，12 MHz 上的 NGD 约为 -10 ns，衰减为 -10 dB，这一点得到了证实。有源CMOS LP-NGD技术将插入损耗补偿至2.4dB，GD达到-11ns，反射损耗达到-20dB。此外，还进行了 TD 研究，以展示通过设计和制造的 LP-NGD CoB 原型生成脉冲和任意波形信号时间提前的可行性。

items.title: PDF: Path-Oriented, Derivative-Free Approach for Safety Falsification of Nonlinear and Nondeterministic CPS.
items.abstract: Cyber-physical systems (CPSs) integrate discrete computations with continuous physical processes and can be highly nonlinear and nondeterministic. Unlike the verification of CPS, which is difficult to handle, the falsification of CPS fulfills certain requirements from testing by seeking witness behavior of these systems and is easier to conduct. However, existing falsification techniques may fail to support the general complex CPS in practice because they usually focus on certain restricted classes of systems. In this article, we present a path-oriented, derivative-free approach to falsify safety properties in nonlinear and nondeterministic CPS. In our approach, we model the behavior of CPS by hybrid automata. Then, we enumerate candidate paths of hybrid automata (HA), transform the feasibility of candidate paths into optimization problems, and solve these optimization problems by our newly proposed classification model-based, derivative-free optimization algorithm. We also provide two novel pruning techniques to further improve the efficiency and efficacy of our approach: 1) a nested optimization structure with better model refinements for continuous search space pruning and 2) a hardly feasible path prefixes guided backtracking for discrete search space pruning. We implement our approach into a tool called PDF. Our experiments showed that PDF supported the safety falsification of CPS in all of our benchmarks, and it achieved success rates no lower than 95% in only seconds on 22/28 of the benchmarks.
items.abstract_zh: 网络物理系统 (CPS) 将离散计算与连续物理过程集成在一起，并且可以是高度非线性和不确定性的。与CPS的验证难以处理不同，CPS的证伪通过寻找这些系统的见证行为来满足测试的某些要求，并且更容易进行。然而，现有的伪造技术在实践中可能无法支持一般的复杂 CPS，因为它们通常专注于某些受限制的系统类别。在本文中，我们提出了一种面向路径、无导数的方法来伪造非线性和非确定性 CPS 中的安全属性。在我们的方法中，我们通过混合自动机对 CPS 的行为进行建模。然后，我们枚举混合自动机（HA）的候选路径，将候选路径的可行性转化为优化问题，并通过我们新提出的基于分类模型的无导数优化算法来解决这些优化问题。我们还提供了两种新颖的剪枝技术，以进一步提高我们方法的效率和功效：1）具有更好模型细化的嵌套优化结构，用于连续搜索空间剪枝；2）几乎不可行的路径前缀引导回溯，用于离散搜索空间剪枝。我们将我们的方法实施到一个名为 PDF 的工具中。我们的实验表明，PDF 在我们所有的基准测试中都支持 CPS 的安全伪造，并且在 22/28 的基准测试中仅几秒就达到了不低于 95% 的成功率。

items.title: STPAcc: Structural TI-Based Pruning for Accelerating Distance-Related Algorithms on CPU-FPGA Platforms.
items.abstract: As a promising solution to boost the performance of distance-related algorithms (e.g., $K$ -means and KNN), FPGA-based acceleration attracts lots of attention, but also comes with numerous challenges. In this work, we propose, STPAcc , an optimization framework based on structural triangle-inequality (TI)-based pruning (STP) for accelerating distance-related algorithms on CPU-FPGA platforms. STPAcc provides a domain-specific language to unify distance-related algorithms effectively, a structural TI-based pruning strategy to remove unnecessary distance computations, a coarse-grained workload partitioning and mapping strategy to fully exploit the potentials of the CPU-FPGA platform, and fine-grained hardware optimizations to further improve performance on the FPGA. Intensive experiments show that STPAcc designs achieve $31.42\times $ speedup and $99.63\times $ better energy efficiency on average over standard CPU-based implementations.
items.abstract_zh: 作为提高距离相关算法性能的有前途的解决方案（例如， $K$ -means 和 KNN），基于FPGA的加速引起了广泛关注，但也带来了众多挑战。在这项工作中，我们提出了 STPAcc ，这是一个基于结构三角不等式 (TI) 剪枝 (STP) 的优化框架，用于在 CPU-FPGA 平台上加速与距离相关的算法。 STPAcc 提供了一种有效统一距离相关算法的领域特定语言、一种基于 TI 的结构修剪策略来消除不必要的距离计算、一种粗粒度的工作负载划分和映射策略来充分利用 CPU-FPGA 平台的潜力，以及一种细粒度的硬件优化来进一步提高 FPGA 的性能。密集实验表明，STPAcc 设计实现了 $31.42\times $ 加速和 $99.63\times $ 与基于 CPU 的标准实现相比，平均能效更高。

items.title: Space-Time-Efficient Modeling of Large-Scale 3-D Cross-Point Memory Arrays by Operation Adaption and Network Compaction.
items.abstract: Three-dimensional (3-D) integrated cross-point memory arrays can be used to build high-density storage-class memory systems. However, the coupled network topology caused by sharing word lines or bit lines between adjacent memory layers significantly enlarges the memory space overhead and time cost of memory operation simulations on mega-scale 3-D cross-point memory arrays. We observe that different components of the 3-D cross-point array have different contribution significance to the key metrics of write or read operations, and the distribution patterns of principal components in the arrays are different for write and read operations. We propose an operation-adaptive array modeling framework that exploits the impact of the applied operation on the distribution of array principal components for 3-D cross-point memory arrays. Based on the modeling framework, we propose two array network compaction methods for efficient write and read operation simulations on 3-D cross-point arrays, respectively: 1) pruning zero-biased unselected cells and 2) group-merging neighboring half-selected cells with a specific granularity. Also, serially connected line segments are merged, and floating segments are deleted. Evaluations show that the proposed methods significantly reduce the memory space overhead and time cost of memory operation simulations for various layer sizes and different cell-level access parallelism in an array. Besides, the proposed methods can efficiently simulate memory operations on multilayered 3-D cross-point memory arrays with up to <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$4096\times 4096$ </tex-math></inline-formula> layer size under the 16-GB memory space constraint, achieving a 64-times improvement in layer size that can be simulated compared with the conventional complete 3-D cross-point array network model.
items.abstract_zh: 三维（3-D）集成交叉点存储器阵列可用于构建高密度存储级存储器系统。然而，相邻存储层之间共享字线或位线所引起的耦合网络拓扑显着增大了大规模3D交叉点存储阵列上的存储操作模拟的存储空间开销和时间成本。我们观察到，3D交叉点数组的不同分量对写入或读取操作的关键指标具有不同的贡献意义，并且数组中主分量的分布模式对于写入和读取操作是不同的。我们提出了一种操作自适应阵列建模框架，该框架利用了所应用的操作对 3D 交叉点存储器阵列的阵列主成分分布的影响。基于建模框架，我们提出了两种阵列网络压缩方法，分别用于在 3D 交叉点阵列上进行高效的写入和读取操作模拟：1）修剪零偏未选择的单元和 2）以特定粒度对相邻的半选择单元进行分组合并。此外，串联连接的线段将被合并，浮动线段将被删除。评估表明，所提出的方法显着降低了阵列中不同层大小和不同单元级访问并行度的内存操作模拟的内存空间开销和时间成本。此外，所提出的方法可以有效地模拟多层3D交叉点存储器阵列上的存储器操作，最高可达 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$4096\times 4096$ </tex-math></inline-formula>在16GB内存空间约束下的层大小，与传统完整的3D交叉点阵列网络模型相比，可模拟层大小提高了64倍。

items.title: HERO: Pbit High-Radix Optical Switch Based on Integrated Silicon Photonics for Data Center.
items.abstract: To establish flatten networks and accomplish rapid and efficient communications in the future hyper-scale data centers, HERO, a high-radix optical switch based on integrated silicon photonics, is proposed in this work. The architecture of HERO, including the switch fabric, switch interface, and switch controller, is described in detail. Two new switch control approaches: 1) split-transaction predictive control and 2) wavelength-group switching, are developed. The efficient control together with the optimized high-radix integrated optical switch fabrics help HERO achieve over 1 Pbps switching capacity. Even for small packets, such as 64–256 B Ethernet packets, the maximal utilization of the switch can reach up to 83%, and the throughput can approximate 1 Pbps. Further design explorations on the packet length and some key configurations, including the number of wavelengths and wavelength groups, are also conducted in this work, paving the way to the design of high-performance flatten data-center networks in the future.
items.abstract_zh: 为了在未来的超大规模数据中心建立扁平化网络并实现快速高效的通信，本文提出了一种基于集成硅光子学的高基数光开关HERO。详细描述了HERO的体系结构，包括交换结构、交换接口和交换控制器。开发了两种新的开关控制方法：1）分离事务预测控制和2）波长组切换。高效的控制加上优化的高基集成光交换结构帮助 HERO 实现了超过 1 Pbps 的交换容量。即使对于小数据包，例如64-256 B以太网数据包，交换机的最大利用率也可以达到83%，吞吐量可以接近1 Pbps。这项工作还对数据包长度和一些关键配置（包括波长和波长组）进行了进一步的设计探索，为未来高性能扁平化数据中心网络的设计铺平了道路。

items.title: ViA: A Novel Vision-Transformer Accelerator Based on FPGA.
items.abstract: Since Google proposed Transformer in 2017, it has made significant natural language processing (NLP) development. However, the increasing cost is a large amount of calculation and parameters. Previous researchers designed and proposed some accelerator structures for transformer models in field-programmable gate array (FPGA) to deal with NLP tasks efficiently. Now, the development of Transformer has also affected computer vision (CV) and has rapidly surpassed convolution neural networks (CNNs) in various image tasks. And there are apparent differences between the image data used in CV and the sequence data in NLP. The details in the models contained with transformer units in these two fields are also different. The difference in terms of data brings about the problem of the locality. The difference in the model structure brings about the problem of path dependence, which is not noticed in the existing related accelerator design. Therefore, in this work, we propose the ViA, a novel vision transformer (ViT) accelerator architecture based on FPGA, to execute the transformer application efficiently and avoid the cost of these challenges. By analyzing the data structure in the ViT, we design an appropriate partition strategy to reduce the impact of data locality in the image and improve the efficiency of computation and memory access. Meanwhile, by observing the computing flow of the ViT, we use the half-layer mapping and throughput analysis to reduce the impact of path dependence caused by the shortcut mechanism and fully utilize hardware resources to execute the Transformer efficiently. Based on optimization strategies, we design two reuse processing engines with the internal stream, different from the previous overlap or stream design patterns. In the stage of the experiment, we implement the ViA architecture in Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA and finally achieved ~5.2 times improvement of energy efficiency compared with NVIDIA Tesla V100, and 4–10 times improvement of performance compared with related accelerators based on FPGA, that obtained nearly 309.6 GOP/s computing performance in the peek.
items.abstract_zh: 自谷歌于2017年提出Transformer以来，它在自然语言处理（NLP）方面取得了重大进展。然而，增加的成本是大量的计算和参数。先前的研究人员设计并提出了一些用于现场可编程门阵列（FPGA）中的变压器模型的加速器结构，以有效地处理NLP任务。现在，Transformer 的发展也影响了计算机视觉（CV），并在各种图像任务中迅速超越了卷积神经网络（CNN）。并且CV中使用的图像数据和NLP中的序列数据存在明显的差异。这两个领域的变压器单元所包含的模型的细节也不同。数据的差异带来了局部性的问题。模型结构的差异带来了路径依赖的问题，而这一问题在现有的相关加速器设计中并未被注意到。因此，在这项工作中，我们提出了 ViA，一种基于 FPGA 的新型视觉变压器 (ViT) 加速器架构，以高效执行变压器应用程序并避免这些挑战的成本。通过分析ViT中的数据结构，我们设计了合适的分区策略，以减少图像中数据局部性的影响，提高计算和内存访问的效率。同时，通过观察ViT的计算流程，我们利用半层映射和吞吐量分析来减少捷径机制带来的路径依赖的影响，充分利用硬件资源高效地执行Transformer。基于优化策略，我们设计了两个具有内部流的复用处理引擎，不同于以往的重叠或流设计模式。在实验阶段，我们在Xilinx Alveo U50 FPGA上实现了ViA架构，最终实现了与NVIDIA Tesla V100相比能效提升约5.2倍，与基于FPGA的相关加速器相比性能提升了4-10倍，峰值时获得了近309.6 GOP/s的计算性能。

items.title: A Fast Precision Tuning Solution for Always-On DNN Accelerators.
items.abstract: Due to the nonvolatility nature of resistive RAM (ReRAM), dynamic operations in the arrays contribute to a much larger portion of power in ReRAM-based neural networks than static power. To reduce the dynamic power of in-situ operations with neural parameters, precision-tuning is considered a viable approach of approximate computing to tradeoff excessive computation exactness for power and efficiency gains. However, the switching overhead of precision tuning in hardware severely impacts its effectiveness when the systems need to quickly react to the change of environment, user constraint or input quality. This work for the first time investigates the feasibility of agile precision tuning for neural network accelerators to benefit from approximate computing. The proposed computing in memory (CiM) CNN accelerators fully utilize the normally off characteristics of memristor crossbars to achieve instant network precision tuning without worrying about the model reloading penalty. The ReRAM-based accelerator, with the proposed neural parameter mapping policy and the novel mixed-model training method, induces negligible precision-switching latency and power consumption when compared with traditional variable precision accelerators. In evaluation with state-of-the-art workloads, the proposed ReRAM deep learning and neural network architecture saves 58.3%–62.47% area overhead over the baseline design. We also leverage the proposed ReRAM accelerator architecture to build a novel always-on key-word spotting (KWS) system. The KWS design can switch between different precision modes to capture the relevant sound with high accuracy. The experimental results show the precision-adjustable KWS architecture saves considerable operating energy when fed with realistic test-sets of audio data.
items.abstract_zh: 由于电阻式 RAM (ReRAM) 的非易失性，阵列中的动态操作在基于 ReRAM 的神经网络中所消耗的功率比静态功率大得多。为了降低神经参数原位操作的动态功耗，精度调整被认为是近似计算的一种可行方法，可以在功耗和效率增益之间权衡过度的计算精确性。然而，当系统需要对环境、用户约束或输入质量的变化做出快速反应时，硬件精确调节的切换开销会严重影响其有效性。这项工作首次研究了神经网络加速器敏捷精确调整以受益于近似计算的可行性。所提出的内存计算（CiM）CNN加速器充分利用忆阻器交叉开关的常闭特性来实现即时网络精度调整，而无需担心模型重新加载损失。与传统的可变精度加速器相比，基于 ReRAM 的加速器采用所提出的神经参数映射策略和新颖的混合模型训练方法，引起的精度切换延迟和功耗可以忽略不计。在对最先进的工作负载进行评估时，所提出的 ReRAM 深度学习和神经网络架构比基准设计节省了 58.3%–62.47% 的面积开销。我们还利用所提出的 ReRAM 加速器架构来构建新颖的始终在线关键词识别 (KWS) 系统。 KWS设计可以在不同精度模式之间切换，以高精度捕获相关声音。实验结果表明，当输入真实的音频数据测试集时，精确可调的 KWS 架构可以节省大量运行能源。

items.title: PVSensing: A Process-Variation-Aware Space Allocation Strategy for 3D NAND Flash Memory.
items.abstract: Three-dimensional (3D) flash memory is an emerging memory technology that enables a number of improvements to conventional planar NAND flash memory, including larger capacity, less program disturb, and lower access latency. Despite these advantages, 3D flash memory brings a number of new challenges. First, in 3D flash memory, NAND strings punch through multiple stacked layers to form the 3D infrastructure. Current etching process is unable to manufacture perfect channels with identical feature size. Second, with more stacked layers, the cell current in 3D flash memory is only 20% compared to planar flash memory, making it difficult to give a reliable sensing margin. These issues are affected by process variation, and they pose threats to the integrity of data stored in 3D flash memory. This article present PVSensing , a process-variation-aware space allocation strategy for open-channel SSD with 3D charge-trap flash memory. PVSensing is a novel hardware and file system interface that can transparently allocate physical space in the presence of process variation. PVSensing utilizes the rich functionalities provided by the system infrastructure of open-channel SSD to reduce the uncorrectable bit errors. Three reliability enhancement strategies (i.e., the adaptive creation of fault cubes, the physical block mining, and the live migration of write requests) are proposed. We demonstrate the viability of the proposed technique using a set of extensive experiments. Experimental results show that PVSensing can effectively reduce uncorrectable bit errors, and improve the reliability of critical data with negligible extra erase operations in comparison with representative schemes.
items.abstract_zh: 三维 (3D) 闪存是一种新兴的存储技术，它对传统平面 NAND 闪存进行了许多改进，包括更大的容量、更少的程序干扰和更低的访问延迟。尽管有这些优点，3D 闪存也带来了许多新的挑战。首先，在 3D 闪存中，NAND 串穿过多个堆叠层形成 3D 基础设施。目前的蚀刻工艺无法制造具有相同特征尺寸的完美通道。其次，由于堆叠层数较多，3D闪存的单元电流仅为平面闪存的20%，因此难以提供可靠的传感余量。这些问题受到工艺变化的影响，并对 3D 闪存中存储的数据的完整性构成威胁。本文介绍 PVSensing，这是一种用于具有 3D 电荷陷阱闪存的开放通道 SSD 的过程变化感知空间分配策略。 PVSensing 是一种新颖的硬件和文件系统接口，可以在存在过程变化的情况下透明地分配物理空间。 PVSensing利用开放通道SSD系统基础设施提供的丰富功能来减少不可纠正的比特错误。提出了三种可靠性增强策略（即故障立方体的自适应创建、物理块挖掘和写请求的实时迁移）。我们通过一系列广泛的实验证明了所提出技术的可行性。实验结果表明，与代表性方案相比，PVSensing可以有效减少不可纠正的位错误，并以可忽略的额外擦除操作提高关键数据的可靠性。

items.title: DBP: Distributed Power Budgeting for Many-Core Systems in Dark Silicon.
items.abstract: Power budget is an important power constraint provided to guarantee the thermal reliability of an integrated system. In this work, we present DBP, a distributed power budgeting method, for dark silicon many-core systems. In DBP, there are two new techniques proposed to bring accurate and optimized power budgets in a distributed way. First, a distributed active core locating technique is developed to find an active core distribution that leads to a high-power budget. Second, a distributed power budget computing technique is introduced which computes the power budget for each active core accurately. Experiments show DBP outperforms the state-of-the-art power budgeting methods’ thermal safe power (TSP) and greedy dynamic power (GDP) on many-core dark silicon systems by providing a high and accurate power budget with low overhead and good scalability.
items.abstract_zh: 功率预算是为保证集成系统的热可靠性而提供的重要功率约束。在这项工作中，我们提出了 DBP，一种用于暗硅众核系统的分布式功率预算方法。 DBP 提出了两种新技术，以分布式方式带来准确且优化的功率预算。首先，开发了一种分布式主动核心定位技术，以找到导致高功率预算的主动核心分布。其次，引入了分布式功率预算计算技术，该技术可以准确计算每个活动核心的功率预算。实验表明，DBP 通过提供高且准确的功率预算、低开销和良好的可扩展性，在多核暗硅系统上优于最先进的功率预算方法的热安全功率 (TSP) 和贪婪动态功率 (GDP)。

items.title: Locking Protocols for Parallel Real-Time Tasks With Semaphores Under Federated Scheduling.
items.abstract: Suspension-based locks are widely used in real-time systems to coordinate simultaneous accesses to exclusive shared resources. Although suspension-based locks have been well studied for sequential real-time tasks, little work has been done on this topic for parallel real-time tasks. This article for the first time studies the problem of how to extend existing sequential-task locking protocols and their analysis techniques to the parallel task model. More specifically, we extend two locking protocols OMLP and OMIP, which were designed for clustered scheduling of sequential real-time tasks, to federated scheduling of parallel real-time tasks. We present corresponding blocking analysis techniques, and develop path-oriented techniques to analyze and count blocking time. Schedulability tests with different efficiency and accuracy are further developed. Experiments are conducted to evaluate the performance of our proposed approaches against the state-of-the-art.
items.abstract_zh: 基于暂停的锁广泛应用于实时系统中，以协调对独占共享资源的同时访问。尽管针对顺序实时任务对基于悬浮的锁进行了深入研究，但针对 并行实时任务。本文首次研究了如何将现有的顺序任务锁定协议及其分析技术扩展到并行任务模型的问题。更具体地说，我们将两个锁定协议 OMLP 和 OMIP 扩展为 连续 实时任务的集群调度，以联合调度 并行实时任务。我们提出了相应的阻塞分析技术，并开发了面向路径的技术来分析和统计阻塞时间。进一步开发了不同效率和精度的可调度性测试。进行实验是为了评估我们提出的方法与最先进方法的性能。

items.title: Flexible and Efficient QoS Provisioning in AXI4-Based Network-on-Chip Architecture.
items.abstract: We propose a network-on-chip (NoC)-based whole system design, whose communication architecture is compatible with the advanced microcontroller bus architecture advanced extensible interface 4 (AXI4) protocol and supports high-performance multiple quality-of-service (QoS) schemes. In our system, the network interface (NI) between the NoC and the master/slave node is proposed to make the NoC architecture independent from the AXI4 protocol via message format conversion between the AXI4 signal format and the packet format, offering high flexibility to the NoC design. Besides, a QoS inheritance mechanism is applied in the slave-side NI to support QoS during packets’ round-trip transfer in the NoC. The NoC system contains time-division multiplexing (TDM) and virtual channel (VC) subnetworks to apply multiple QoS schemes to AXI4 signals with different QoS tags, and the NI is responsible for signals distribution between two subnetworks. Besides, a traffic converter is proposed in each NI to balance the traffic between the two subnetworks when necessary. The experimental results show that our proposed architecture ensures a high-throughput and low-latency NoC system. By applying the traffic converter, the packet latency can be improved.
items.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于片上网络（NoC）的整体系统设计，其通信架构与先进的微控制器总线架构高级可扩展接口4（AXI4）协议兼容，并支持高性能的多种服务质量（QoS）方案。在我们的系统中，提出了NoC和主/从节点之间的网络接口（NI），通过AXI4信号格式和数据包格式之间的消息格式转换，使NoC架构独立于AXI4协议，为NoC设计提供了高度灵活性。此外，从侧NI中应用了QoS继承机制，以支持数据包在NoC中往返传输期间的QoS。 NoC 系统包含时分复用 (TDM) 和虚拟通道 (VC) 子网，可将多种 QoS 方案应用于具有不同 QoS 标签的 AXI4 信号，NI 负责两个子网之间的信号分配。此外，每个NI中都建议有一个流量转换器，以在必要时平衡两个子网之间的流量。实验结果表明，我们提出的架构确保了高吞吐量和低延迟的NoC系统。通过应用流量转换器，可以改善数据包延迟。

items.title: SoFI: Security Property-Driven Vulnerability Assessments of ICs Against Fault-Injection Attacks.
items.abstract: Fault-injection attacks have become a major concern for hardware designs, primarily due to their powerful capability in tampering with critical locations in a device to cause violation of its integrity, confidentiality, and availability. Researchers have proposed a number of physical and architectural countermeasures against fault-injection attacks; however, these techniques usually come with large overhead and design efforts making them difficult to use in practice. In addition, the current electronic design automation (EDA) tools are not fully equipped to support vulnerability assessment against fault-injection attacks at the design-time for secure hardware development. To perform a design-time (i.e., presilicon) evaluation of such attacks, a designer should be aware of various security vulnerabilities and must perform a tedious manual design review, which is time-consuming and hard to ensure effectiveness. Therefore, it is very important to develop an automatic assessment framework to identify the most security-critical locations in a design to fault-injection attacks and place emphasis on protecting those locations. In this article, we propose an automated framework for fault-injection vulnerability assessment of designs at gate-level, while considering the design-specific security properties (SPs) using novel models and metrics. The proposed framework identifies the faults that can violate the SPs of the design. As a result, applying local countermeasures will be more effective and the protection overhead will be reduced significantly. Our experimental results on the SP of AES, RSA, and SHA implementations show that the security threat from fault-injection attacks can be significantly mitigated by protecting the identified critical locations, which are less than 0.6% of the design.
items.abstract_zh: 故障注入攻击已成为硬件设计的一个主要问题，主要是因为它们具有篡改设备中关键位置以导致其完整性、机密性和可用性遭到破坏的强大能力。研究人员提出了许多针对故障注入攻击的物理和架构对策；然而，这些技术通常需要大量的开销和设计工作，使得它们难以在实践中使用。此外，当前的电子设计自动化（EDA）工具还没有完全支持在安全硬件开发的设计时针对故障注入攻击的漏洞评估。为了对此类攻击进行设计时（即硅前）评估，设计人员应该了解各种安全漏洞，并且必须执行繁琐的手动设计审查，这既耗时又难以确保有效性。因此，开发一个自动评估框架来识别故障注入攻击设计中最安全关键的位置并重点保护这些位置非常重要。在本文中，我们提出了一个用于门级设计的故障注入漏洞评估的自动化框架，同时使用新颖的模型和指标考虑特定于设计的安全属性（SP）。所提出的框架可识别可能违反设计 SP 的故障。因此，应用本地对策将更加有效，并且保护开销将显着降低。我们对 AES、RSA 和 SHA 实现的 SP 的实验结果表明，通过保护已识别的关键位置（不到设计的 0.6%）可以显着减轻来自故障注入攻击的安全威胁。

items.title: Equivalence Checking of Sequential Quantum Circuits.
items.abstract: We define a formal framework for equivalence checking of sequential quantum circuits. The model we adopt is a quantum state machine, which is a natural quantum generalisation of Mealy machines. A major difficulty in checking quantum circuits (but not present in checking classical circuits) is that the state spaces of quantum circuits are continuums. This difficulty is resolved by our main theorem showing that equivalence checking of two quantum Mealy machines can be done with input sequences that are taken from some chosen basis (which are finite) and have a length quadratic in the dimensions of the state Hilbert spaces of the machines. Based on this theoretical result, we develop an (and to the best of our knowledge, the first) algorithm for checking equivalence of sequential quantum circuits with running time $\mathcal{O}(2^{3m+5l}(2^{3m}+2^{3l}))$, where $m$ and $l$ denote the numbers of input and internal qubits, respectively. The complexity of our algorithm is comparable with that of the known algorithms for checking classical sequential circuits in the sense that both are exponential in the number of (qu)bits. Several case studies and experiments are presented.
items.abstract_zh: 我们定义了一个用于顺序量子电路等价性检查的正式框架。我们采用的模型是量子状态机，它是 Mealy 机的自然量子推广。检查量子电路的一个主要困难（但在检查经典电路中不存在）是量子电路的状态空间是连续体。我们的主要定理解决了这个困难，该定理表明两个量子 Mealy 机的等价性检查可以通过从某个选定的基础（有限的）中获取的输入序列来完成，并且在机器的状态希尔伯特空间的维度上具有长度二次方。基于这一理论结果，我们开发了一种（据我们所知，第一个）算法来检查顺序量子电路与运行时间 $\mathcal{O}(2^{3m+5l}(2^{3m}+2^{3l}))$ 的等价性，其中 $m$ 和 $l$ 分别表示输入和内部量子位的数量。我们的算法的复杂性与用于检查经典时序电路的已知算法的复杂性相当，因为两者在（qu）位的数量上都是指数级的。介绍了几个案例研究和实验。

items.title: SSSL: Secure Search Space Locking of Behavioral IPs.
items.abstract: Raising the level of VLSI design abstraction from the Register Transfer Level (RTL) to the behavioral level has multiple advantages: (i) It reduces the turn-around-time, (ii) allows faster verification and (iii) extends the re-usability of the design as High-Level Synthesis (HLS) automatically re-optimizes the synthesized circuit when new process technologies are available by simply selecting a different technology library. Moreover, HLS makes extensive use of synthesis directives that control how to synthesize mainly loops (unroll or pipeline), arrays (register or RAM) and functions (inline or not). This further increases the re-usability of the behavioral code as it enables the generation of micro-architectures with different area vs. performance trade-offs. These advantages open the door to third party IP (3PIP) vendors providing Behavioral IPs (BIPs). Unfortunately, the market of third party BIPs is still very small and mostly limited to the HLS vendors themselves. Being so flexible is also their main weakness as it makes them only economically viable if the BIP provider can charge a large premium as it is highly unlikely that the BIP consumer will require their service again. Traditional IP vendors discriminate the price of the IP based on the amount of flexibility of the IP, e.g., RTL description vs. providing a synthesized gate netlist. We envision a similar price discrimination strategy for BIPs by limiting the re-usability of the BIP by partially encrypting the BIP source code. The main idea is to limit the search space, and hence, the re-usability of the BIP such that it only allows the BIP consumer to generate micro-architectures within a pre-defined search space range. This is accomplished by selectively fixing some of the synthesis directives in the form of pragmas at the source code while leaving others explorable. By encrypting the portion of the BIP that contains the fix pragmas we can guarantee that no designs outside of the pre-defined search space are generated. We believe that this work could serve as catalyst to grow the BIP market.
items.abstract_zh: 将 VLSI 设计抽象级别从寄存器传输级别 (RTL) 提升到行为级别具有多种优势：(i) 缩短周转时间，(ii) 允许更快的验证，(iii) 扩展设计的可重用性，因为当新工艺技术可用时，只需选择不同的技术库，高级综合 (HLS) 就会自动重新优化综合电路。此外，HLS 广泛使用综合指令来控制如何综合主要循环（展开或管道）、数组（寄存器或 RAM）和函数（内联或非内联）。这进一步提高了行为代码的可重用性，因为它能够生成具有不同面积与性能权衡的微架构。这些优势为提供行为 IP (BIP) 的第三方 IP (3PIP) 供应商打开了大门。不幸的是，第三方 BIP 的市场仍然很小，并且大多仅限于 HLS 供应商本身。如此灵活也是他们的主要弱点，因为只有当 BIP 提供商可以收取高额费用时，他们才能在经济上可行，因为 BIP 消费者不太可能再次需要他们的服务。传统 IP 供应商根据 IP 的灵活性来区分 IP 的价格，例如 RTL 描述与提供综合门网表。我们设想对 BIP 采取类似的价格歧视策略，通过部分加密 BIP 源代码来限制 BIP 的可重用性。主要思想是限制搜索空间，从而限制 BIP 的可重用性，使其只允许 BIP 使用者在预定义的搜索空间范围内生成微架构。这是通过在源代码中以编译指示的形式有选择地修复一些综合指令，同时保留其他指令可探索来实现的。通过加密包含修复指令的 BIP 部分，我们可以保证不会生成预定义搜索空间之外的设计。我们相信这项工作可以成为 BIP 市场发展的催化剂。

items.title: Tinkertoy: Build Your Own Operating Systems for IoT Devices.
items.abstract: The Internet of Things (IoT) makes it possible for tiny devices with sensing and communication capabilities to be interconnected and interact with the cyber–physical world. However, these tiny devices have limited computing power and memory, so they often cannot run commodity operating systems, such as Windows and Linux. IoT devices are deployed everywhere, from smart home appliances to self-driving vehicles, and their applications impose ever-increasing and more heterogeneous demands on software architecture. There are many special-purpose and embedded operating systems built to satisfy these wildly different requirements, from early sensor network operating systems, such as TinyOS and Contiki, to more modern robot and real-time control systems, such as FreeRTOS and Zephyr. However, the rapid evolution and heterogeneity of IoT applications calls for a different solution. Specifically, this work introduces Tinkertoy, a collection of standard operating system modules from which developers can easily assemble customized operating systems. A customized operating system provides precisely the functionality needed by an application and consumes up to four times less memory than other IoT operating systems without sacrificing performance.
items.abstract_zh: 物联网 (IoT) 使具有传感和通信功能的微型设备能够与网络物理世界互连并交互。然而，这些微型设备的计算能力和内存有限，因此它们通常无法运行 Windows 和 Linux 等商用操作系统。从智能家电到自动驾驶汽车，物联网设备无处不在，其应用对软件架构提出了不断增长且更加异构的要求。有许多专用和嵌入式操作系统是为了满足这些截然不同的要求而构建的，从早期的传感器网络操作系统（如 TinyOS 和 Contiki）到更现代的机器人和实时控制系统（如 FreeRTOS 和 Zephyr）。然而，物联网应用的快速发展和异构性需要不同的解决方案。具体来说，这项工作介绍了 Tinkertoy，这是一组标准操作系统模块，开发人员可以从中轻松组装定制操作系统。定制的操作系统可精确提供应用程序所需的功能，并且在不牺牲性能的情况下消耗的内存比其他物联网操作系统少四倍。

items.title: Combating Stealthy Thermal Covert Channel Attack With Its Thermal Signal Transmitted in Direct Sequence Spread Spectrum.
items.abstract: Many-core systems are susceptible to attacks launched by thermal covert channel (TCC) attacks. Detection of TCC attacks often relies on the use of threshold-based approaches or variants, and a countermeasure to thwart the channel can be applied only after an attack is deemed to be present. In this article, we describe a direct sequence spread spectrum (DSSS)-based TCC, where its thermal data are modulated by a pseudo-random bit sequence. Unfortunately, such DSSS-based TCC has an extremely low signal strength that the signal is nearly indistinguishable from the noise and thus cannot be detected by any existing threshold-based detection methods. To combat this stealthy TCC, we propose a novel detection scheme that lets the received signal pass through a differential filter where irrelevant frequency components occupied mainly by the noise gets eliminated and the filtered signal is next compared against a threshold for successful detection. Experimental results show that the DSSS-based TCC can effectively survive detection by the existing detection methods with its BER as low as 4%. In contrast, with the proposed detection and countermeasure applied, the detection accuracy jumps to 89%, and the BER of the DSSS-based TCC soars to 50%, which indicates that the TCC is practically shut down.
items.abstract_zh: 众核系统容易受到热隐蔽通道 (TCC) 攻击发起的攻击。 TCC 攻击的检测通常依赖于使用基于阈值的方法或变体，并且只有在认为存在攻击后才能应用阻止通道的对策。在本文中，我们描述了一种基于直接序列扩频 (DSSS) 的 TCC，其中其热数据由伪随机位序列调制。不幸的是，这种基于DSSS的TCC信号强度极低，信号与噪声几乎无法区分，因此无法通过任何现有的基于阈值的检测方法来检测。为了对抗这种隐秘的TCC，我们提出了一种新颖的检测方案，让接收到的信号通过差分滤波器，其中主要由噪声占据的不相关频率分量被消除，然后将滤波后的信号与阈值进行比较以成功检测。实验结果表明，基于DSSS的TCC能够有效地通过现有检测方法的检测，误码率低至4%。相比之下，应用所提出的检测和对策后，检测精度跃升至 89%，基于 DSSS 的 TCC 的 BER 飙升至 50%，这表明 TCC 实际上已关闭。

items.title: An Efficient Deep Learning Accelerator Architecture for Compressed Video Analysis.
items.abstract: Previous neural network accelerators tailored to video analysis only accept data of RGB/YUV domain, requiring decompressing the video that are often compressed before transmitted from the edge sensors. A compressed video processing accelerator can alleviate the decoding overhead, and gain performance speedup by operating on more compact input data. This work proposes a novel deep learning accelerator architecture, Alchemist, which is able to predict results directly from the compressed video bitstream instead of reconstructing the full RGB images. By utilizing the metadata of motion vector and critical blocks extracted from bitstreams, Alchemist contributes to a remarkable performance speedup of 5x with negligible accuracy loss. Nevertheless, we still find that the original compressed video coded by standard algorithms such as H.264 is not suitable to be directly manipulated, due to diverse compressed structures. Although obviating the requirement to recover all RGB frames, the accelerator must parse the entire compressed video bitstream to locate reference frames and extract useful metadata. If we combine the video codec with the proposed compressed video analysis, additional optimizations can be obtained. Therefore, to cope with the mismatch between current video coding algorithms, such as H.264 and neural network-based video analysis, we propose a specialized coding strategy to generate compressed video bitstreams more suitable for transmission and analysis, which further simplifies the decoding stage of video analysis and is capable of achieving significant storage reduction.
items.abstract_zh: 以前专为视频分析量身定制的神经网络加速器仅接受 RGB/YUV 域的数据，需要对从边缘传感器传输之前通常经过压缩的视频进行解压缩。压缩视频处理加速器可以减轻解码开销，并通过处理更紧凑的输入数据来提高性能。这项工作提出了一种新颖的深度学习加速器架构 Alchemist，它能够直接从压缩视频比特流中预测结果，而不是重建完整的 RGB 图像。通过利用从比特流中提取的运动矢量和关键块的元数据，Alchemist 实现了 5 倍的显着性能加速，而精度损失可以忽略不计。尽管如此，我们仍然发现，由于压缩结构多样，采用H.264等标准算法编码的原始压缩视频不适合直接操作。尽管不需要恢复所有 RGB 帧，但加速器必须解析整个压缩视频比特流以定位参考帧并提取有用的元数据。如果我们将视频编解码器与所提出的压缩视频分析相结合，可以获得额外的优化。因此，为了应对当前视频编码算法（例如H.264）与基于神经网络的视频分析之间的不匹配，我们提出了一种专门的编码策略来生成更适合传输和分析的压缩视频比特流，这进一步简化了视频分析的解码阶段，并且能够显着减少存储空间。

items.title: Analog Circuit Yield Optimization via Freeze-Thaw Bayesian Optimization Technique.
items.abstract: While the VLSI community cares about designs with high yields under process variations, expensive computational costs make conventional yield optimization methods for analog circuits inefficient for industrial applications. In this article, an efficient yield optimization method via the freeze–thaw Bayesian optimization technique is proposed for analog circuits. The yield analysis is integrated into the exploration process of the Bayesian optimization. With a specified Gaussian process regression method, the flexible freeze–thaw Bayesian optimization technique is utilized to automatically guide the search in the design space and control the accuracy of yield analysis in the process space. A performance optimization problem is formulated and solved to mine prior knowledge, and a further speed up is achieved. Experimental results show that the proposed method can gain a <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$2.47\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> – <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.73\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> speedup compared with the state-of-the-art methods, without loss of accuracy.
items.abstract_zh: 虽然 VLSI 社区关心在工艺变化下实现高良率的设计，但昂贵的计算成本使得模拟电路的传统良率优化方法对于工业应用来说效率低下。在本文中，提出了一种针对模拟电路的通过冻融贝叶斯优化技术的有效良率优化方法。产量分析被集成到贝叶斯优化的探索过程中。通过指定的高斯过程回归方法，利用灵活的冻融贝叶斯优化技术，自动引导设计空间中的搜索，控制过程空间中成品率分析的准确性。制定并解决性能优化问题以挖掘先验知识，并实现进一步的加速。实验结果表明，该方法可以获得 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$2.47\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> – <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.73\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 与最先进的方法相比，速度提高，且不损失准确性。

items.title: PACA: A Pattern Pruning Algorithm and Channel-Fused High PE Utilization Accelerator for CNNs.
items.abstract: In recent years, convolutional neural networks (CNNs) have achieved significant advancements in various fields. However, the computation and storage overheads of CNNs are overwhelming for Internet-of-Things devices. Both network pruning algorithms and hardware accelerators have been introduced to empower CNN inference at the edge. Network pruning algorithms reduce the size and computational cost of CNNs by regularizing unimportant weights to zeros. However, existing works lack intrakernel structured types to tradeoff between sparsity and hardware efficiency, and the index storage for irregularly pruned networks is significant. Hardware accelerators leverage the sparsity of pruned CNNs to improve energy efficiency. However, their process element (PE) utilization rate is low because of uneven sparsity among input convolutional kernels. To overcome these problems, we propose PACA: a Pattern pruning Algorithm and Channel-fused high PE utilization Accelerator for CNNs. It includes three parts: a pattern pruning algorithm to explore the intrakernel sparsity type and reduce the index storage, a channel-fused hardware architecture to reduce the PEs’ idle rate and improve the performance, and a heuristic and taboo search-based smart fusion scheduler to analyze the idle PE problem and schedule the channel fusion in hardware. To demonstrate the effectiveness of PACA, we have implemented the software parts by Python and the hardware architecture by RTL codes. Experimental results on various datasets show that compared with an existing work, PACA can reduce the index storage overhead by <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$3.47\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> – <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.63\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> with 3.85–9.12 average patterns, and it can improve the hardware performance by <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$2.01\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> – <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.53\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> because of PEs’ idle rate reduction.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，卷积神经网络（CNN）在各个领域取得了显着的进步。然而，CNN 的计算和存储开销对于物联网设备来说是巨大的。网络剪枝算法和硬件加速器都已被引入，以增强 CNN 边缘推理能力。网络剪枝算法通过将不重要的权重正规化为零来减少 CNN 的大小和计算成本。然而，现有的工作缺乏内核结构类型来在稀疏性和硬件效率之间进行权衡，并且不规则修剪网络的索引存储非常重要。硬件加速器利用修剪后的 CNN 的稀疏性来提高能源效率。然而，由于输入卷积核之间的稀疏性不均匀，它们的过程元素（PE）利用率较低。为了克服这些问题，我们提出了 PACA：一种用于 CNN 的模式剪枝算法和通道融合高 PE 利用率加速器。它包括三个部分：模式剪枝算法，探索内核稀疏类型并减少索引存储；通道融合硬件架构，降低PE空闲率并提高性能；基于启发式和禁忌搜索的智能融合调度器，分析空闲PE问题并在硬件中调度通道融合。为了证明PACA的有效性，我们通过Python实现了软件部分，并通过RTL代码实现了硬件架构。在各种数据集上的实验结果表明，与现有工作相比，PACA可以减少索引存储开销 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$3.47\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> – <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.63\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 平均模式为 3.85–9.12，可以通过以下方式提高硬件性能： <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$2.01\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> – <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$5.53\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 因为 PE 闲置率降低。

items.title: Experimental Verification and Analysis of the Acceleration Factor Model for 3-D nand Flash Memory.
items.abstract: With the increasing density of flash memory, its service life is declining. As the most important technical index of a flash device, flash retention parameters often need to consume a substantial amount of time to be tested. With a view toward reducing the test period, the most popular method currently is to speedup the retention loss of flash memory at high temperatures. However, since the retention loss of flash memory is the result of a mixture of multiple failure mechanisms, the Arrhenius model with a single apparent activation energy ( <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$E_{aa}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> ) has significant limitations in calculating the high-temperature acceleration factor for the retention loss of flash memory. In this article, based on a large number of real experiments, we have studied the retention characteristics of the flash memory in high-temperature environments and closely tracked the change of <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$E_{aa}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> at different temperatures, retention time, and program/erase (P/E) cycle count. The experimental results show that the equivalent acceleration factor (AF) grows rapidly with retention time at the beginning of flash retention and that flash with a high P/E cycle count has a faster AF growth rate.
items.abstract_zh: 随着闪存密度的不断增加，其使用寿命也在下降。作为闪存器件最重要的技术指标，闪存保留参数往往需要耗费大量的时间进行测试。为了缩短测试周期，目前最流行的方法是加快闪存在高温下的保持损失。然而，由于闪存的保留损失是多种故障机制混合的结果，因此具有单一表观激活能的阿伦尼乌斯模型 ( <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$E_{aa}$ </tex-math></inline-formula> ）在计算闪存保留损耗的高温加速因子时具有很大的局限性。本文基于大量真实实验，研究了闪存在高温环境下的保持特性，并密切跟踪<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$E_{aa}$的变化</tex-math></inline-formula> 在不同温度、保留时间和编程/擦除 (P/E) 周期计数下。实验结果表明，在闪存保留开始时，等效加速因子（AF）随着保留时间快速增长，并且P/E循环次数高的闪存具有更快的AF增长率。

items.title: TCSE: A Target Cell States Elimination Coding Strategy for Highly Reliable Data Storage Based on 3-D nand Flash Memory.
items.abstract: With the wide application of NAND flash storage systems in read-intensive memory, the corresponding reliability enhancement strategies for mitigating read disturb become the focus of investigations in recent years. The prior investigations have reported the strategies based on data modulation and verified their effectiveness in mitigating retention loss. The most significant advantage of these strategies is that they can often achieve significant reliability enhancement effect with great read performance, since they are usually based on asymmetric coding. This feature means that they have the potential to be ideal reliability enhancement strategies for read-intensive memory applications. To propose a universal and highly reliable data storage strategy, this article first observes the error modes at the cell-state level under the reliability stresses of retention loss and read disturb with floating-gate (FG) 3-D triple-level (TLC) NAND flash, and then proposes a target cell states elimination (TCSE) coding strategy for further restraining bit errors. In addition, this article for the first time reports the extra bit errors generated in the decoding process of the storage strategies based on data modulation, and defines the concept of transfer factor (TF) for evaluation. By using the proposed TCSE, the experimental results show that the overall bit error rate (BER) can be reduced by 80%–90% on average, compared with the raw random data pattern.
items.abstract_zh: 随着NAND闪存存储系统在读密集型存储器中的广泛应用，相应的减轻读干扰的可靠性增强策略成为近年来研究的热点。先前的研究报告了基于数据调制的策略，并验证了它们在减轻保留损失方面的有效性。这些策略最显着的优点是它们通常可以实现显着的可靠性增强效果和良好的读取性能，因为它们通常基于非对称编码。这一特性意味着它们有可能成为读取密集型内存应用的理想可靠性增强策略。为了提出一种通用且高可靠的数据存储策略，本文首先观察浮栅（FG）3D三级（TLC）NAND闪存在保留丢失和读取干扰的可靠性压力下单元状态级别的错误模式，然后提出一种目标单元状态消除（TCSE）编码策略以进一步抑制位错误。此外，本文首次报道了基于数据调制的存储策略在解码过程中产生的额外比特错误，并定义了传输因子（TF）的概念进行评估。通过使用所提出的 TCSE，实验结果表明，与原始随机数据模式相比，总体误码率 (BER) 平均可降低 80%–90%。

items.title: Fast and Efficient High-Sigma Yield Analysis and Optimization Using Kernel Density Estimation on a Bayesian Optimized Failure Rate Model.
items.abstract: With ever-increasing transistor density in nanoscale-integrated circuits, the impact of process variations on circuit performance and chip yield becomes dominant. To prevent failures in the field, simulation-based circuit optimization tools are performed during design time as a countermeasure. However, the efficiency of these tools requires accurate modeling of failure probabilities. Especially, for high-sigma problems such as yield estimation of memory cells, which require very high production yield, the failure rate assessment must be highly accurate. Importance sampling (IS) methods are deployed in this context to uncover very rare failure events, which cannot be revealed by standard Monte Carlo methods. Besides a highly accurate yield prediction model, the limited time budget of the simulation-based analysis tools has to be taken into account. Especially in conjunction with yield optimization techniques, the required number of circuit simulations for the failure rate estimation has to be substantially reduced. In this article, we propose a yield optimization method, which is based on a Bayesian optimization (BO) failure rate estimation technique for high-sigma yield extraction. The BO-based IS method is combined with a kernel density estimator for finding the most probable failure events, which have significant contribution to the chip yield. By integration into a global optimization framework, we show how the proposed yield optimization method can be applied to high-sigma yield optimization problems, such as memory cells. The experimental results indicate that the proposed method consumes only 5% circuit simulations to achieve the same optimization effect as the state-of-the-art yield optimizer techniques.
items.abstract_zh: 随着纳米级集成电路中晶体管密度的不断增加，工艺变化对电路性能和芯片良率的影响变得占主导地位。为了防止现场出现故障，在设计时执行基于仿真的电路优化工具作为对策。然而，这些工具的效率需要对故障概率进行准确的建模。特别是对于高西格玛问题，例如存储单元的良率估计，需要非常高的生产良率，因此故障率评估必须高度准确。在这种情况下，部署重要性采样 (IS) 方法来发现非常罕见的故障事件，而标准蒙特卡罗方法无法揭示这些事件。除了高精度的产量预测模型之外，还必须考虑基于模拟的分析工具的有限时间预算。特别是与良率优化技术相结合，必须大大减少故障率估计所需的电路模拟次数。在本文中，我们提出了一种良率优化方法，该方法基于用于高西格玛良率提取的贝叶斯优化（BO）故障率估计技术。基于 BO 的 IS 方法与内核密度估计器相结合，用于查找最可能的故障事件，这对芯片良率有重大贡献。通过集成到全局优化框架中，我们展示了所提出的良率优化方法如何应用于高西格玛良率优化问题，例如存储单元。实验结果表明，所提出的方法仅消耗 5% 的电路仿真，即可达到与最先进的良率优化器技术相同的优化效果。

items.title: Via-Based Redistribution Layer Routing for InFO Packages With Irregular Pad Structures.
items.abstract: The integrated fan-out (InFO) wafer-level chip-scale package (WLCSP) is introduced for modern system-in-package designs with larger I/O counts, higher interconnection density, and small form factors. A redistribution layer (RDL) in an InFO package is an extra metal layer for interchip connections, and RDL routing is crucial for achieving desired interchip connections. In a high-density InFO package, multiple RDLs with flexible vias are often adopted. To integrate chips of different technology nodes into one package, irregular pad structures need to be considered; however, no published RDL routing work considers flexible vias or irregular pad structures. This article formulates a new RDL routing problem with unified-assigned pad pairs on a via-based multilayer multichip InFO package with irregular pad structures and presents the first algorithm for this problem. The algorithm consists of a preprocessing stage, three routing stages, and a layout optimization stage. The preprocessing stage analyzes routing resources and potential routing congestion. The first routing stage performs layer assignment based on a weighted maximum planar subset of chords algorithm to route interchip nets concurrently. The second routing stage constructs a 3-D routing graph based on partitioned octagonal tiles to handle the irregular layout structure and applies A*-search to route remaining interchip nets. The third routing stage transforms a routing graph into a network-flow model to perform concurrent routing for chip-to-board nets by applying the minimum-cost maximum-flow algorithm. Finally, we develop an efficient linear-programming-based layout optimization algorithm to find desired solutions. Experimental results show that our router can achieve 100% routablility for all benchmarks under limited RDLs, while the previous state-of-the-art work cannot.
items.abstract_zh: 集成扇出 (InFO) 晶圆级芯片级封装 (WLCSP) 专为具有更大 I/O 数量、更高互连密度和小外形尺寸的现代系统级封装设计而推出。 InFO 封装中的再分布层 (RDL) 是用于芯片间连接的额外金属层，RDL 布线对于实现所需的芯片间连接至关重要。在高密度InFO封装中，通常采用具有柔性通孔的多个RDL。为了将不同技术节点的芯片集成到一个封装中，需要考虑不规则的焊盘结构；然而，没有已发表的 RDL 布线工作考虑灵活的过孔或不规则的焊盘结构。本文提出了一个新的 RDL 布线问题，该问题在具有不规则焊盘结构的基于通孔的多层多芯片 InFO 封装上具有统一分配的焊盘对，并提出了该问题的第一个算法。该算法由一个预处理阶段、三个布线阶段和一个布局优化阶段组成。预处理阶段分析路由资源和潜在的路由拥塞。第一布线阶段基于弦算法的加权最大平面子集执行层分配，以同时布线芯片间网络。第二个布线阶段基于分区的八角形图块构建 3D 布线图来处理不规则的布局结构，并应用 A* 搜索来布线剩余的芯片间网络。第三路由阶段将路由图转换为网络流模型，通过应用最小成本最大流算法来执行芯片到板网络的并发路由。最后，我们开发了一种高效的基于线性规划的布局优化算法来找到所需的解决方案。实验结果表明，我们的路由器可以在有限的 RDL 下实现所有基准测试的 100% 可路由性，而之前最先进的工作则不能。

items.title: WA-OPShare: Workload-Adaptive Over-Provisioning Space Allocation for Multi-Tenant SSDs.
items.abstract: Sharing a flash-based solid-state drive (SSD) among multiple tenants has become a common practice to improve storage utilization and cost efficiency. Meanwhile, how to allocate limited storage resources, especially the over-provisioning space (OPS) resources, among competitive tenants has emerged as a critical problem. The OPS refers to additional user-invisible storage space, whose size influences garbage collection (GC) efficiency. Due to unawareness of workload characteristics of different tenants, prior studies on multitenant OPS allocation lead to suboptimal SSD performance. In this article, we propose a novel workload-adaptive OPS allocation scheme for multitenant SSDs, called WA-OPShare. It targets an OPS sharing scheme that dynamically allocates the OPS among tenants to improve overall SSD performance. Two models are developed to identify underutilized storage space and predict the OPS-induced performance benefit of each tenant, respectively. Guided by the models, WA-OPShare regularly releases the underutilized storage space and then reallocates it to the tenant who can benefit the most. Experimental results show that compared to the traditional Partition and Sharing schemes, WA-OPShare improves the performance by up to 40.3% and 31.2%, and reduces the write amplification by up to 37.0% and 17.5%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 在多个租户之间共享基于闪存的固态硬盘 (SSD) 已成为提高存储利用率和成本效率的常见做法。同时，如何在竞争激烈的租户之间分配有限的存储资源，特别是超额配置空间（OPS）资源也成为一个关键问题。 OPS是指额外的用户不可见的存储空间，其大小影响垃圾收集（GC）效率。由于不了解不同租户的工作负载特征，先前对多租户 OPS 分配的研究导致 SSD 性能不理想。在本文中，我们提出了一种适用于多租户 SSD 的新型工作负载自适应 OPS 分配方案，称为 WA-OPShare。它的目标是 OPS 共享方案，在租户之间动态分配 OPS，以提高 SSD 的整体性能。我们开发了两个模型来分别识别未充分利用的存储空间并预测每个租户由 OPS 带来的性能优势。在模型的指导下，WA-OPShare定期释放未充分利用的存储空间，然后将其重新分配给最能受益的租户。实验结果表明，与传统的分区和共享方案相比，WA-OPShare的性能提升分别高达40.3%和31.2%，并分别降低了37.0%和17.5%的写放大。

items.title: Causal Path Identification for Timed and Sequential Circuits.
items.abstract: Self-timed and pulse mode circuit modules are often implemented using combinational logic with feedback, or require timing constraints for the circuit to function correctly. Identifying causal paths through these circuit modules is a fundamental requirement to enable automatic system level timing closure, performance analysis, and timing-driven optimizations when using static timing analysis algorithms. A methodology and algorithm for identifying causal paths in cyclic sequential circuits under arbitrary timing models are presented. The algorithm identifies causal paths in a sequential circuit implemented with standard cell gates. The algorithm is demonstrated by identifying causal paths for over 100 asynchronous finite-state machines and timed circuits designed using a variety of timing models. Cyclic paths, pulse generating paths, and unbounded length self-enabling loops are identified inside these circuit blocks. Some of the causal paths in these designs have never been previously identified. No preliminary versions of this work have been previously published.
items.abstract_zh: 自定时和脉冲模式电路模块通常使用带反馈的组合逻辑来实现，或者需要时序约束以使电路正确运行。在使用静态时序分析算法时，识别通过这些电路模块的因果路径是实现自动系统级时序收敛、性能分析和时序驱动优化的基本要求。提出了一种在任意时序模型下识别循环时序电路中因果路径的方法和算法。该算法识别使用标准单元门实现的时序电路中的因果路径。通过识别 100 多个异步有限状态机和使用各种时序模型设计的定时电路的因果路径来演示该算法。这些电路块内部标识了循环路径、脉冲生成路径和无限长度自使能环路。这些设计中的一些因果路径以前从未被确定过。此前尚未出版过该作品的初步版本。

items.title: HiMap: Fast and Scalable High-Quality Mapping on CGRA via Hierarchical Abstraction.
items.abstract: Coarse-grained reconfigurable array (CGRA) has emerged as a promising hardware accelerator due to the excellent balance between reconfigurability, performance, and energy efficiency. The performance of a CGRA strongly depends on the existence of a high-quality compiler to map the application kernels on the architecture. Unfortunately, the state-of-the-art compiler technology falls short in generating high-performance mapping within an acceptable compilation time, especially with increasing CGRA size. We propose HiMap —a fast and scalable CGRA mapping approach—that is also adept at producing close-to-optimal solutions for regular computational kernels prevalent in existing and emerging application domains. The key strategy behind HiMap ’s efficiency and scalability is to exploit the regularity in the computation by employing a virtual systolic array (VSA) as an intermediate abstraction layer in a hierarchical mapping. HiMap first maps the loop iterations of the kernel onto a VSA and then distills out the unique patterns in the mapping. These unique patterns are subsequently mapped onto subspaces of the physical CGRA. They are arranged together according to the systolic array mapping to create a complete mapping of the kernel. Experimental results confirm that HiMap can generate application mappings that hit the performance envelope of the CGRA. HiMap offers $17.3\times $ and $5\times $ improvement in performance and energy efficiency of the mappings compared to the state of the art. The compilation time of HiMap for near-optimal mappings is less than 15 min for 64 $\times $ 64 CGRA while existing approaches take days to generate inferior mappings.
items.abstract_zh: 由于可重构性、性能和能源效率之间的出色平衡，粗粒度可重构阵列（CGRA）已成为一种有前景的硬件加速器。 CGRA 的性能很大程度上取决于是否存在高质量编译器来将应用程序内核映射到架构上。不幸的是，最先进的编译器技术无法在可接受的编译时间内生成高性能映射，尤其是在 CGRA 大小不断增加的情况下。我们提出了 HiMap——一种快速且可扩展的 CGRA 映射方法——它也擅长为现有和新兴应用领域中流行的常规计算内核生成接近最优的解决方案。 HiMap 的效率和可扩展性背后的关键策略是通过使用虚拟脉动阵列 (VSA) 作为分层映射中的中间抽象层来利用计算中的规律性。 HiMap 首先将内核的循环迭代映射到 VSA，然后提取映射中的独特模式。这些独特的模式随后被映射到物理 CGRA 的子空间上。它们根据脉动数组映射排列在一起，以创建内核的完整映射。实验结果证实 HiMap 可以生成达到 CGRA 性能范围的应用程序映射。 HiMap 提供<内联公式 xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> $17.3\times $ 和 与现有技术相比，映射的性能和能源效率提高了 $5\times $ 。 HiMap 近乎最佳映射的编译时间对于 64 个 $\times $ 64 CGRA 而现有方法需要几天时间才能生成较差的映射。

items.title: Blocks: Challenging SIMDs and VLIWs With a Reconfigurable Architecture.
items.abstract: Demand for coarse grain reconfigurable architectures (CGRAs) has significantly increased in recent years as architectures need to be both energy efficient and flexible. However, most CGRAs are optimized for performance instead of energy efficiency. In this work, a novel paradigm for reconfigurable architectures, Blocks, is presented. Blocks uses two separate circuit-switched networks, one for control and one for the data path. This enables the runtime construction of energy-efficient application-specific VLIW-SIMD processors on a reconfigurable fabric. Its energy efficiency is demonstrated by comparing Blocks to four reference architectures, a VLIW, an SIMD, a commercial low-power microprocessor, and a traditional CGRA. All comparisons are based on commercial low-power 40-nm CMOS layout, including memories. Results show that Blocks can achieve a mean total energy reduction of <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$2.05\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> , <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.84\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> , <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$8.01\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> , and <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.22\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> over a VLIW, an SIMD, an energy-efficient microprocessor and a traditional CGRA, respectively. At the same time, Blocks delivers equal or higher performance per area due to its ability to adapt to applications by reconfiguration.
items.abstract_zh: 近年来，由于架构需要节能且灵活，对粗粒可重构架构（CGRA）的需求显着增加。然而，大多数 CGRA 都是针对性能而非能源效率进行优化的。在这项工作中，提出了一种可重构架构的新颖范例：Blocks。 Blocks 使用两个独立的电路交换网络，一个用于控制，一个用于数据路径。这使得能够在可重新配置的结构上运行时构造高能效的应用专用 VLIW-SIMD 处理器。通过将 Blocks 与四种参考架构（VLIW、SIMD、商用低功耗微处理器和传统 CGRA）进行比较，证明了其能源效率。所有比较均基于商业低功耗 40 nm CMOS 布局，包括存储器。结果表明，Blocks 可以实现平均总能量降低 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$2.05\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 、 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.84\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> , <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$8.01\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 和 <inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"> <tex-math notation="LaTeX">$1.22\times $ </tex-math></inline-formula> 分别通过 VLIW、SIMD、节能微处理器和传统 CGRA。同时，Blocks 由于能够通过重新配置来适应应用程序，因此可以在每个区域提供相同或更高的性能。

items.title: A Fast Analysis Method of Multiphysics Coupling for 3-D Microsystem.
items.abstract: Accurate and fast multiphysics coupling analysis is of great significance to the design of microsystems. In this article, we propose a fast analysis method to improve the computational efficiency of the multiphysics coupling problem in 3-D microsystems. In this method, an iterative dual cell method (IDCM) is developed to deal with electro-thermal coupling problems, and the superposition principle is used to calculate thermal stress. The comparison between the proposed method and the finite element method (FEM) shows that IDCM and superposition principle have high accuracy, and IDCM can reduce the calculation time by up to 30% than FEM. This article studies in detail the changes of temperature and stress with two types of Through silicon via arrays, (TSV) and discusses the influence of the C4-bump layout on the stress distribution. Our work demonstrated that the proposed method can quickly and accurately perform multiphysics coupling analyzes of 3-D microsystems.
items.abstract_zh: 准确、快速的多物理场耦合分析对于微系统的设计具有重要意义。在本文中，我们提出了一种快速分析方法来提高 3D 微系统中多物理场耦合问题的计算效率。该方法发展了迭代双池法（IDCM）来处理电热耦合问题，并利用叠加原理计算热应力。所提方法与有限元法（FEM）的比较表明，IDCM和叠加原理具有较高的精度，并且IDCM比FEM可减少高达30%的计算时间。本文详细研究了两种类型的硅通孔阵列 (TSV) 的温度和应力变化，并讨论了 C4 凸块布局对应力分布的影响。我们的工作表明，所提出的方法可以快速准确地执行 3D 微系统的多物理场耦合分析。

items.title: FLAM-PUF: A Response-Feedback-Based Lightweight Anti-Machine-Learning-Attack PUF.
items.abstract: Physical unclonable functions (PUFs) have been adopted in many resource-constrained Internet of Things (IoT) applications to provide effective and lightweight s
items.abstract_zh: 物理不可克隆函数（PUF）已在许多资源受限的物联网（IoT）应用中得到采用，以提供有效且轻量级的解决方案。

items.title: Cooperative Communication Between Two Transiently Powered Sensor Nodes by Reinforcement Learning.
items.abstract: Energy harvesting (EH)-powered sensor nodes can achieve theoretically unlimited lifetime by scavenging energy from ambient power sources, such as radio-frequency (RF) and kinetic energy. The nodes can collect and transmit data wirelessly with the harvested energy. However, the transmission between two sensor nodes is successful only when both nodes have enough energy at the same time. While the receiver can be actively listening, it may deplete the energy long before the sender has accumulated enough energy. Thus, given the scarce, unpredictable, and unevenly distributed energy among sensor nodes, it is challenging to ensure efficient data transmission between them. To address this challenge, we propose a sensor node architecture with multiple radios, each with different energy consumption on the sender and receiver. A node can be put into sleep when charged up and wakes up for communication when it infers that both nodes have enough energy based on its observations. What is more, two nodes can cooperatively and dynamically select different radios according to the stored energy and historical information to maximize the data throughput. To achieve cooperative communication adaptively, the communication procedure is modeled as a cooperative Markov game with partial observability on each node, and multiagent reinforcement learning (MARL) is employed to achieve the best results. Experimental results on hardware prototype and by simulation show that the proposed approaches achieve up to 89.1% of the optimal throughput and significantly outperform other online algorithms.
items.abstract_zh: 能量收集 (EH) 供电的传感器节点理论上可以通过从环境电源（例如射频 (RF) 和动能）中获取能量来实现无限的寿命。节点可以利用收集到的能量来无线收集和传输数据。然而，只有当两个传感器节点同时拥有足够的能量时，两个传感器节点之间的传输才能成功。虽然接收器可以主动监听，但在发送器积累足够的能量之前，它可能会耗尽能量。因此，鉴于传感器节点之间能量稀缺、不可预测且分布不均匀，确保它们之间的高效数据传输具有挑战性。为了应对这一挑战，我们提出了一种具有多个无线电的传感器节点架构，每个无线电在发送器和接收器上具有不同的能耗。节点在充电时可以进入睡眠状态，并在根据其观察推断两个节点都有足够的能量时醒来进行通信。更重要的是，两个节点可以根据存储的能量和历史信息协作动态地选择不同的无线电，以最大化数据吞吐量。为了自适应地实现协作通信，通信过程被建模为每个节点上具有部分可观测性的协作马尔可夫博弈，并采用多智能体强化学习（MARL）来实现最佳结果。硬件原型和仿真的实验结果表明，所提出的方法实现了高达 89.1% 的最佳吞吐量，并且显着优于其他在线算法。

items.title: iNVMFS: An Efficient File System for NVRAM-Based Intermittent Computing Devices.
items.abstract: Developing toward battery-less, energy-harvesting designs is a promising direction for sensor-scale devices. The recent introduction of byte-addressable, nonvolatile memory (NVRAM) enables intermittent computing, which preserves as much program progress across power interruptions as possible using fine-grained checkpoints. Sensing applications strongly demand local storage for near-data processing, and there is no exception for intermittent computing devices. While checkpointing on program progress is being studied recently, there is little work regarding how sensor file systems support intermittent computing. On power recovery, although the program progress is reverted to the latest checkpoint, the storage state stays at the instant of power loss. To remedy this problem, we present a lightweight file system for efficient operations on files and checkpoints. Our design exploits the byte addressability of NVRAM and uses as much in-place byte writing as possible while guaranteeing the safety of checkpoint operations. We evaluated our design against two prior checkpoint-enabled file systems, and results show that on average, our design reduced the total time overhead and energy consumption by 77% and 78%, respectively.
items.abstract_zh: 向无电池、能量收集设计发展是传感器规模设备的一个有前途的方向。最近推出的字节可寻址非易失性存储器 (NVRAM) 可实现间歇性计算，从而使用细粒度检查点在电源中断时尽可能多地保留程序进度。传感应用强烈需要本地存储来进行近数据处理，间歇性计算设备也不例外。虽然最近正在研究程序进度的检查点，但关于传感器文件系统如何支持间歇性计算的工作却很少。电源恢复时，虽然程序进度恢复到最新的检查点，但存储状态仍保持在断电瞬间。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一个轻量级文件系统，用于对文件和检查点进行高效操作。我们的设计利用了 NVRAM 的字节寻址能力，在保证检查点操作安全的同时，尽可能多地使用就地字节写入。我们针对两个先前启用检查点的文件系统评估了我们的设计，结果表明，我们的设计平均将总时间开销和能耗分别减少了 77% 和 78%。

items.title: Performance Enhancement of SMR-Based Deduplication Systems.
